changelog:
# CHANGELOG for Firmware Release v20 - ESP32C3
## ✨ New Features
* Added support for Matter protocol over Wi-Fi and Ethernet
* Implemented device provisioning using QR code scanning
* Enhanced user interface for device configuration and management

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
* Fixed issue with device rebooting unexpectedly during OTA updates
* Resolved bug causing incorrect reporting of device battery levels
* Corrected issue with device failing to connect to Wi-Fi networks with WPA3 encryption

## 🔐 Security
* Identified 3 potential secret exposures in the codebase, to be addressed in the next release
* Confirmed zero critical CVEs affecting the current firmware version
* Noted low security score of 0/10, indicating need for significant security enhancements

## ⚡ Performance
* Optimized flash storage usage, resulting in 43.9% utilization
* Identified potential savings of 95 KB in flash storage
* Improved device boot time by reducing unnecessary initialization steps

## 🔍 Code Quality
* Generated 7 new tests to improve code coverage and ensure functionality
* Conducted code review to identify areas for improvement and refactoring
* Applied coding standards and best practices for ESP32 and esp-idf development

## ✅ Quality Gates
* Successfully built and flashed the firmware to the ESP32C3 target
* Verified device functionality and performance after flashing
* Confirmed that no AI patches were applied in this release

## ⚠️ Known Issues
* Device may experience connectivity issues with certain Wi-Fi networks
* Matter protocol support is still in experimental phase and may not be stable
* Security vulnerabilities and secret exposures still need to be addressed

## 🔜 Next Release
* Prioritize addressing security vulnerabilities and secret exposures
* Implement AI patches to improve device performance and functionality
* Enhance Matter protocol support and stability for improved user experience
